name: token-coach
description: Reads GitHub Copilot's local debug logs and coaches you toward cheaper token usage by surfacing cost (NanoAiu) and cache hit rates.

tokenCoach.costWarnThreshold.markdownDescription:
**Alert threshold — credits per request.**

Token Coach pops up a notification (and flags the row on the dashboard) only when a **single** Copilot request costs **more than this many credits**. Raise it to stay quiet, lower it to catch smaller spikes.

Default `25` credits. _1 credit = 1 AIU = $0.01, so `25` ≈ **$0.25** spent on one request — genuinely expensive, not routine._

tokenCoach.planMonthlyUsd.markdownDescription:
**Monthly budget — your Copilot plan price, in dollars.**

This is the budget Token Coach measures the month's spend against: the status bar tints **green** while you're comfortably under it, **yellow** as you approach it (80%+), and **red** once you pass it.

Common plans: Pro `$10` · Business `$19` · Enterprise / Pro+ `$39`. Default `$19`.

_Token Coach only ever shows what you actually **used** — never a quota or a bill — and the count resets on the 1st of each month, like GitHub's credit meter. Set `0` to turn off budget tinting._

tokenCoach.notifyOnExpensiveRequest.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Pop up a notification when a single Copilot request costs more than the alert threshold** (`#tokenCoach.costWarnThreshold#`). Turn off for silent tracking.

tokenCoach.notifyOnInefficiency.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Show a gentle, occasional tip when a message wastes money in a fixable way** — the cache went cold mid-chat, or open/attached files dominate the context. At most one tip every 5 minutes.

tokenCoach.notificationAutoDismissSecond.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Seconds before a Token Coach notification closes itself.** Alerts and tips disappear on their own after this many seconds so they never pile up. Default `3`. Set `0` to keep classic sticky notifications (with an *Open Dashboard* button) that stay until you dismiss them.

tokenCoach.usdPerAiu.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Dollars per credit, for the `$` estimates.** GitHub bills **1 AI credit = $0.01**, so the default is `0.01`. Set to `0` to hide all dollar amounts and show credits only.

tokenCoach.inputWarnThreshold.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Flag a request that sends more than this many input tokens** — a big, expensive prompt. Default `50000`.

tokenCoach.lowCacheRateThreshold.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Flag a request that reuses less than this share of its prompt cache** (`cachedTokens / inputTokens`), but only when the prompt is also large (see *Low-cache minimum input* below). Default `0.5` (50%).

tokenCoach.lowCacheMinInputTokens.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Smallest prompt the low-cache warning applies to** — keeps tiny requests from being nagged. Default `20000` input tokens.

tokenCoach.ioRatioThreshold.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Flag a request where input dwarfs output** (`inputTokens / outputTokens` above this) — lots of context sent for little produced. Default `1000`.

tokenCoach.ioMinInputTokens.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Smallest prompt the input-dwarfs-output warning applies to**, so small side-calls aren't mislabelled. Default `10000` input tokens.

tokenCoach.attachmentShareWarn.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Flag a message when open / attached files make up more than this share of its logged context.** Default `0.4` (40%). _(Copilot only itemizes context on the first turn, so cached history isn't counted.)_

tokenCoach.slowToolWarnMs.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Flag a message when one tool takes longer than this** (milliseconds, summed across its calls). Default `10000` (10s).

tokenCoach.cacheIdleMinutes.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Idle minutes after which the prompt cache is assumed to have expired.** If a mid-chat message arrives after a longer pause **and** its cache reuse actually dropped, it's flagged. Claude's cache TTL is ~5 min; OpenAI's ~5–10. Set `0` to disable idle detection.

tokenCoach.costInputWeight.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ Price weight for **fresh (uncached) input** when splitting each request's real logged cost into input / cached / output for the breakdown. The total stays exact — only the split is estimated. Baseline `1`.

tokenCoach.costCachedInputWeight.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ Price weight for **cached input** in the cost split (see `#tokenCoach.costInputWeight#`). Cached reads are far cheaper, so `0.1` (~10% of fresh input).

tokenCoach.costOutputWeight.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ Price weight for **output** in the cost split (see `#tokenCoach.costInputWeight#`). Output is the priciest, so `4` (~4× fresh input).

tokenCoach.unusedToolMinChats.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **How consistently a tool must go unused before it's flagged** as a candidate to disable. Net counter: +1 for each chat the tool was offered but never called, −1 (floored at `0`) for each chat it *was* used in. Default `3`.

tokenCoach.pollIntervalSeconds.markdownDescription: _(Advanced)_ **Backup refresh interval** (seconds), on top of the live file watcher. Set to `0` to rely on the watcher only. Default `20`.
